CREATE TABLE polygons (id UInt32, coordinates Array(LowCardinality(Point)));
SELECT id, polygonPerimeterSpherical(coordinates, 6) AS perimeter FROM polygons;
SELECT sub.id, sub.perimeter FROM (SELECT id, polygonPerimeterSpherical(coordinates, 6) AS perimeter FROM polygons) AS sub WHERE sub.perimeter > 0;
CREATE TABLE area_data AS SELECT id, polygonPerimeterSpherical(coordinates, 6) AS perimeter FROM polygons;
SELECT area.id, area.perimeter FROM area_data AS area JOIN polygons AS geo ON area.id = geo.id WHERE area.perimeter < 100;
SELECT polygonPerimeterSpherical((SELECT coordinates FROM polygons WHERE id = 4), 6) AS new_perimeter;
